_minFreeGB_note: pnpm global install via npm is < 100 MB. 0.5 GB lets the smart drive picker accept drives that heavy tools (Docker, JDK, model downloads) would correctly reject.

store._storePath_doc: Optional pinned pnpm store directory. When null (default) the script uses smart dev-dir auto-resolution (cached in .resolved/dev-drive-cache.json) and falls back to %LOCALAPPDATA%\pnpm\store if no qualifying drive is found. Only set this to an absolute path if you want to FORCE a specific location -- and only if its drive will always be mounted.
